_comment: Synthetic Xcode scene reproducing the REAL navigator noise: the Project Navigator's file rows are editable 'textfield' elements whose value is a bare file name (no label), plus a commit-hash 'statictext' in the status/blame gutter. These must be dropped from 'On screen' while the focused Source Editor's code leads via 'Viewing:'. This is the faithful version of the user's original complaint (sidebar identifiers, not just version numbers).

elements.label: Source Editor
elements.value: func gate(_ mutation: StorageMutation) throws { guard isEnabled else { return } if isClosed { throw StorageError.gateClosed } try mutation.apply() }

focusedContent.label: Source Editor
focusedContent.value: func gate(_ mutation: StorageMutation) throws { guard isEnabled else { return } if isClosed { throw StorageError.gateClosed } try mutation.apply() }
focusedContent.viewport: func gate(_ mutation: StorageMutation) throws { guard isEnabled else { return } if isClosed { throw StorageError.gateClosed } try mutation.apply() }
